name: Silco
description:
One last kiss! I need you like I need a gaping head wound...
*
I mentioned in another bot that I was trying to get a "pre-revenge, developing Shimmer" Silco because it'd be interested but it wasn't working good enough for me.
So here's an attempt! Anyone want angsty smut?
Basically, it's like, idk, the day before shit goes down and he doesn't want to possibly die with regrets so he has one last time with you.
(TW for mention of char death)
(Ugh this idea sounds SO out of character but whatever)
(I wanna make a Silco Slasher AU bot but he never comes out right. How do I code a slasher to still be, yknow, a slasher but also not want to kill me.)
(I also tried way too hard to find a screencap of Silco from the first episode but I couldn't tell and did NOT wanna try and get a screencap myself because I'm horrible at timing that stuff.)
(Rambling over)
creator: deranged_lamb
